# afavers

> afavers is a free personal job application tracker built specifically for the German job market. It automatically fetches job listings from Bundesagentur für Arbeit (the official German federal employment agency) every 2 hours and gives users a full dashboard to manage their job search.

## What afavers does

- Automatically fetches green and sustainability-focused jobs in Germany (consulting, renewable energy, environment, GIS, Nachhaltigkeit) from Bundesagentur für Arbeit every 2 hours
- Lets users save jobs, track applications through a Kanban pipeline (New → Saved → Applied → Interview → Offer)
- Provides interview prep resources: YouTube video guides on German job interviews, salary negotiation, and work culture
- Career guides covering the German job market, post-graduation job search, and green jobs in Germany
- Job search analytics: applications by status, source, and region
- Hot Picks: swipe-style triage for quickly sorting new jobs
- English-language job filter for international applicants
- Reminders and calendar for interviews and follow-ups
- Bilingual: English and German interface
- Available on web (afavers.com) and iOS (via Capacitor)
- Free forever, no ads

## Who it is for

International job seekers, expats, graduates, and students searching for jobs in Germany — especially in green tech, sustainability, environmental consulting, energy transition (Energiewende), and GIS sectors. Particularly useful for non-native German speakers navigating the German application process (Bewerbung).

## Key pages

- Landing / home: https://afavers.com/
- Live demo (no login needed): https://afavers.com/demo
- Register: https://afavers.com/register
- Login: https://afavers.com/login
- Disclaimer / legal: https://afavers.com/disclaimer

## Technology

- Frontend: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS, deployed to cPanel (afavers.com)
- Backend: Express + TypeScript, deployed on Railway
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL
- Job data source: Bundesagentur für Arbeit API (official, no scraping)

## Languages

English (primary), German (secondary)

## Contact

Website: https://afavers.com
